name: Pajotte Transport

possible NEMT van per NPI listing

name: Old School Limo Transportation
districts_or_customers: Family-pay shuttle to schools and daycares in Waukegan / Lake County, IL; no public school district contracts identified; Waukegan CUSD #60 lists its own transportation provider separately. Operates as Old School Transportation & OST Logistics, LLC.
recent_news: Operating ~22 years with A+ BBB rating (not accredited); no M&A, growth, or safety news identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit: small private-pay child shuttle/limo hybrid (~2 employees, ~$172K revenue), not a contracted yellow-bus operator. Long-tenured (20+ years) family business but well below Summit's tuck-in scale; no district contract base to bolt on.
